rows.brief: Build a team chat app where companies create workspaces, users join channels and DMs, send messages with attachments, and stay connected in real-time. Production product, not a demo.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Handle user registration, login, and session management securely.

modules_detailed.title: Workspace management
modules_detailed.description: Allow companies to create and manage their own workspaces.

modules_detailed.title: Channel & DM features
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to join channels and send direct messages.

modules_detailed.title: Message handling
modules_detailed.description: Implement real-time messaging with support for attachments.

modules_detailed.title: Notifications system
modules_detailed.description: Notify users of new messages and activity.

modules_detailed.title: Admin dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Provide an interface for workspace admins to manage users and settings.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Set up deployment pipeline and continuous integration for updates.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & logging
modules_detailed.description: Implement monitoring and logging for system performance and troubleshooting.

rows.brief: Build a fast issue tracker for software teams. Users create issues, assign owners, move them through statuses on a board, and see updates live as teammates work. Long-term product, multiple companies use it.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Enable users to securely log in and manage their accounts.

modules_detailed.title: Issues Management
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to create, update, and delete issues with relevant details.

modules_detailed.title: User Roles & Permissions
modules_detailed.description: Define roles for users to control access and actions on issues.

modules_detailed.title: Kanban Board
modules_detailed.description: Visual board for tracking issues across different statuses in real-time.

modules_detailed.title: Live Updates
modules_detailed.description: Enable real-time notifications for changes to issues and statuses.

modules_detailed.title: Collaborative Features
modules_detailed.description: Allow users to comment, tag, and communicate on issues.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & Logging
modules_detailed.description: Implement logging to monitor system performance and track issues.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Set up automated deployment pipelines for continuous integration and delivery.

rows.brief: Build a payments platform for a specific industry (think: Stripe for law firms). Merchants onboard, accept cards, manage chargebacks, see settlements, and reconcile their books. Production, multi-year horizon.
Build a CRM for B2B sales teams: contacts, accounts, deals in a pipeline, activity timeline, email integration, reports. Each company has 20-200 reps. Real product, paying customers expected.

modules_detailed.title: User authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage user accounts and secure access to the CRM.

modules_detailed.title: Contacts management
modules_detailed.description: Create, update, and organize contacts within the CRM.

modules_detailed.title: Accounts management
modules_detailed.description: Handle company records and their associated details.

modules_detailed.title: Deals pipeline
modules_detailed.description: Track deals through various stages in the sales pipeline.

modules_detailed.title: Activity timeline
modules_detailed.description: Log and view all customer interactions and activities.

modules_detailed.title: Email integration
modules_detailed.description: Integrate email services for communication with contacts.

modules_detailed.title: Reporting dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Generate and display reports on sales activities and performance.

modules_detailed.title: Roles & permissions
modules_detailed.description: Define user roles and access levels within the CRM.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Automate deployment processes and ensure continuous integration.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & logging
modules_detailed.description: Implement analytics and logging for monitoring application health.

rows.brief: Build an AI copilot inside a domain SaaS app (e.g. legal). Users chat with the assistant, it pulls from their documents, drafts responses, learns their style. Production-grade product with paying users.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Manage user identities and secure access to the application.

modules_detailed.title: Document Management
modules_detailed.description: Store and organize user documents for AI access and learning.

modules_detailed.title: AI Chat Assistant
modules_detailed.description: Facilitate user interaction through a conversational chat interface.

modules_detailed.title: Response Drafting
modules_detailed.description: Generate document drafts based on user input and document context.

modules_detailed.title: Style Learning
modules_detailed.description: Implement machine learning to adapt to users' writing styles over time.

modules_detailed.title: Roles & Permissions
modules_detailed.description: Define user roles to manage access levels and document permissions.

modules_detailed.title: Observability & Logging
modules_detailed.description: Track user interactions and system performance for insights and debugging.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Automate deployment processes to ensure smooth updates and scalability.

modules_detailed.title: Security & Compliance
modules_detailed.description: Implement security measures and compliance tracking for user data.

rows.brief: Build an observability platform: customers send logs/metrics/traces from their infrastructure, we ingest at scale, run queries, build dashboards, fire alerts. Multi-tenant, production, infra-grade reliability.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Secure login system for users to access the platform.

modules_detailed.title: Data Ingestion
modules_detailed.description: API for users to send logs, metrics, and traces at scale.

modules_detailed.title: Query Engine
modules_detailed.description: Process queries on ingested data to return relevant results.

modules_detailed.title: Dashboard Builder
modules_detailed.description: Create customizable dashboards to visualize data for users.

modules_detailed.title: Alerts & Notifications
modules_detailed.description: System for users to set alerts based on data thresholds.

modules_detailed.title: Multi-Tenancy Management
modules_detailed.description: Ensure data isolation and security for multiple customers.

modules_detailed.title: Observability Foundations
modules_detailed.description: Implement logging, monitoring, and performance metrics for the platform.

modules_detailed.title: Deployment & CI/CD
modules_detailed.description: Set up automated deployment process and continuous integration pipeline.

rows.brief: Build an online marketplace where buyers find services and sellers list offers, messages and bookings happen on-platform, payments held in escrow until delivery, with reviews and dispute handling. Real production product.

modules_detailed.title: User Authentication
modules_detailed.description: Implement secure user authentication and session management for buyers and sellers.

modules_detailed.title: Service Listings
modules_detailed.description: Allow sellers to create and manage their service listings on the platform.

modules_detailed.title: Search & Discovery
modules_detailed.description: Enable buyers to efficiently search and browse services offered by sellers.

modules_detailed.title: Messaging System
modules_detailed.description: Facilitate communication between buyers and sellers through an integrated messaging system.

modules_detailed.title: Booking Management
modules_detailed.description: Handle service bookings, scheduling, and notifications for buyers and sellers.

modules_detailed.title: Payments & Escrow
modules_detailed.description: Manage payments held in escrow until the service is successfully delivered.

modules_detailed.title: Reviews & Feedback
modules_detailed.description: Allow buyers to leave reviews and feedback on completed services.

modules_detailed.title: Dispute Handling
modules_detailed.description: Establish a process for managing service disputes between buyers and sellers.

modules_detailed.title: Admin Dashboard
modules_detailed.description: Provide an interface for administrators to manage users, services, and disputes.

modules_detailed.title: Logging & Monitoring
modules_detailed.description: Implement observability and logging for performance tracking and issue resolution.

modules_detailed.title: Security & Compliance
modules_detailed.description: Ensure the platform meets security standards and maintains compliance requirements.

modules_detailed.title: CI/CD Pipeline
modules_detailed.description: Set up a continuous integration and deployment pipeline for reliable production releases.

rows.brief: Build a realtime multiplayer collaborative whiteboard. Multiple users see each other's cursors, edit shapes together with no flicker, comment, share via link. Production product, teams use it daily.
